description: Test corpus for the ssrf-prevention skill. SSRF is a code-level dataflow no deterministic gate scanner traces, so this is a schema-driven corpus: the runner smoke-validates fixture shape, and the detect/ignore pairs double as ground truth for the LLM eval harness. detect = an HTTP client called directly on a request value; ignore = the same fetch behind the allowlist guard the skill mandates.

fixtures.text: app.get('/proxy', async (req, res) => { const resp = await fetch(req.query.url); res.type(resp.headers.get('content-type')).send(Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer())); });
fixtures.reason: client-supplied URL fetched server-side with no validation (CWE-918)

fixtures.text: const { assertAllowedUrl } = require('./ssrf-guard'); app.get('/proxy', async (req, res) => { const target = await assertAllowedUrl(req.query.url); const resp = await fetch(target); res.type(resp.headers.get('content-type')).send(Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer())); });
fixtures.reason: URL validated against an allowlist before the fetch

fixtures.text: app.post('/webhook-test', async (req, res) => { const result = await axios.get(req.body.callbackUrl); res.json({ status: result.status }); });
fixtures.reason: customer-supplied callback URL fetched without allowlisting

fixtures.text: const { assertAllowedUrl } = require('./ssrf-guard'); app.post('/webhook-test', async (req, res) => { const url = await assertAllowedUrl(req.body.callbackUrl); const result = await axios.get(url); res.json({ status: result.status }); });
app.get('/preview', async (req, res) => { const resp = await fetch(req.query.target); res.json({ title: extractTitle(await resp.text()) }); });
fixtures.reason: remote page fetched from a raw request parameter

fixtures.text: const { assertAllowedUrl } = require('./ssrf-guard'); app.get('/preview', async (req, res) => { const target = await assertAllowedUrl(req.query.target); const resp = await fetch(target); res.json({ title: extractTitle(await resp.text()) }); });
